metadata.name: Kubernetes NetworkPolicy
metadata.description: Creates a Kubernetes NetworkPolicy with targeted pod selection, optional ingress and egress policy types, and simple peer and port controls for common isolation patterns.

items.name: resource_name
items.title: NetworkPolicy name
items.description: Name to use for the NetworkPolicy.

items.name: namespace
items.title: Namespace
items.description: Namespace for the resource.

items.name: apply_to_all_pods
items.title: Apply to all Pods
items.description: Target all Pods in the namespace instead of a specific label selector.

items.name: pod_selector_label_key
items.title: Pod selector label key
items.description: Label key used to select target Pods.

items.name: pod_selector_label_value
items.title: Pod selector label value
items.description: Label value used to select target Pods.

items.name: ingress_enabled
items.title: Ingress policy
items.description: Enable ingress rules for the policy.

items.name: ingress_allow_same_namespace
items.title: Allow same-namespace ingress
items.description: Allow ingress from any Pod in the same namespace.

items.name: ingress_namespace_selector_enabled
items.title: Namespace selector
items.description: Allow ingress from namespaces matching one label selector.

items.name: ingress_namespace_selector_label_key
items.title: Namespace selector label key
items.description: Namespace label key used for the ingress namespace selector.

items.name: ingress_namespace_selector_label_value
items.title: Namespace selector label value
items.description: Namespace label value used for the ingress namespace selector.

items.name: ingress_ipblock_enabled
items.title: IPBlock source
items.description: Allow ingress from one CIDR block.

items.name: ingress_ipblock_cidr
items.title: Ingress CIDR
items.description: CIDR block allowed for ingress traffic.

items.name: ingress_port_enabled
items.title: Port restriction
items.description: Restrict ingress to one port.

items.name: ingress_port
items.title: Ingress port
items.description: Port allowed for ingress traffic.

items.name: ingress_port_protocol
items.title: Ingress port protocol
items.description: Protocol used for the ingress port.

items.name: egress_enabled
items.title: Egress policy
items.description: Enable egress rules for the policy.

items.name: egress_allow_same_namespace
items.title: Allow same-namespace egress
items.description: Allow egress to any Pod in the same namespace.

items.name: egress_namespace_selector_enabled
items.title: Namespace selector
items.description: Allow egress to namespaces matching one label selector.

items.name: egress_namespace_selector_label_key
items.title: Namespace selector label key
items.description: Namespace label key used for the egress namespace selector.

items.name: egress_namespace_selector_label_value
items.title: Namespace selector label value
items.description: Namespace label value used for the egress namespace selector.

items.name: egress_ipblock_enabled
items.title: IPBlock destination
items.description: Allow egress to one CIDR block.

items.name: egress_ipblock_cidr
items.title: Egress CIDR
items.description: CIDR block allowed for egress traffic.

items.name: egress_port_enabled
items.title: Port restriction
items.description: Restrict egress to one port.

items.name: egress_port
items.title: Egress port
items.description: Port allowed for egress traffic.

items.name: egress_port_protocol
items.title: Egress port protocol
items.description: Protocol used for the egress port.
